playbook.intent: Once a week to updated sales pipeline + 3-5 next-step actions assigned per active deal.
playbook.scope: Founder walks the sales pipeline once a week, decides which deals advance, which die, and what outreach happens this week. Output: updated pipeline + 3-5 next-step actions assigned. Exit artifact: pipeline doc with stage + decision + next-step per active deal.

success-criteria.criterion: Each active deal has stage + decision + next-step
Dead deals are killed in writing
5 or fewer next-step actions assigned for the week

tasks.task: Pull current stage counts + conversion rates

stage.name: Walk each deal
stage.intent: Triage each active deal: advance, kill, hold.

tasks.task: Review every deal against last week's notes
Apply kill rule to stuck deals

stage.decision-gate: Each deal must have one of: advance / kill / explicit hold.

stage.name: Commit actions
stage.intent: 5 or fewer actions for the week, owned and timestamped.
stage.decision-gate: Required: 5 or fewer actions, each calendar-blocked. If more, kill some deals.

extra.value: [Long-form weekly strategy review - atomic ritual only, Outbound list-building - separate workflow]
['Pipeline tracker (Notion, Airtable, HubSpot Free, Sheets)', Last-week notes from prior pipeline review]
[Refusing to kill stuck deals - pipeline stays inflated but nothing advances, Adding 15 actions every Monday - finishes none, Skipping the kill rule because 'they might come back']
['Did I actually kill at least one deal this quarter?', 'Is every advancing deal on my calendar?', 'Did I update the doc, or just look at it?']

{human: faion get-content monday-lead-pipeline-review --format md, agent: faion get-content monday-lead-pipeline-review --format context, json: faion get-content monday-lead-pipeline-review --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
